dialogue.text: I have already made up my mind
dialogue.local_pron: wo yi jing xiang qing chu le
dialogue.zh_pron: wo yi jing xiang qing chu le

dialogue.text: The happiness I cannot give
dialogue.local_pron: wo gei bu liao de xing fu
dialogue.zh_pron: wo gei bu liao de xing fu

dialogue.text: Let's still be friends
dialogue.local_pron: wo men hai shi peng you ba
dialogue.zh_pron: wo men hai shi peng you ba

dialogue.text: Actually, it's quite good
dialogue.local_pron: qi shi ting hao de
dialogue.zh_pron: qi shi ting hao de

dialogue.text: It will definitely come
dialogue.local_pron: yi ding hui lai de
dialogue.zh_pron: yi ding hui lai de

dialogue.text: A complicated smile on the face
dialogue.local_pron: lian shang fu za de xiao rong
dialogue.zh_pron: lian shang fu za de xiao rong

dialogue.text: That originally should be mine
dialogue.local_pron: na yuan ben gai shi wo
dialogue.zh_pron: na yuan ben gai shi wo

dialogue.text: The promise I gave you
dialogue.local_pron: fu yu ni de cheng nuo
dialogue.zh_pron: fu yu ni de cheng nuo

dialogue.text: Now I can only hide in the crowd
dialogue.zh: 现在我只能隐身热闹中
dialogue.ja: 现在我只能隐身热闹中
dialogue.local: 现在我只能隐身热闹中
dialogue.local_pron: xian zai wo zhi neng yin shen re nao zhong
dialogue.zh_pron: xian zai wo zhi neng yin shen re nao zhong

dialogue.text: I follow everyone
dialogue.local_pron: wo gen zhe suo you ren
dialogue.zh_pron: wo gen zhe suo you ren

dialogue.text: When thinking of congratulating you
dialogue.local_pron: xiang ni zhu he de shi hou
dialogue.zh_pron: xiang ni zhu he de shi hou

dialogue.text: Only you know I drank a few more glasses
dialogue.zh: 只有你知道我多喝了几杯酒
dialogue.ja: 只有你知道我多喝了几杯酒
dialogue.local: 只有你知道我多喝了几杯酒
dialogue.local_pron: zhi you ni zhi dao wo duo he le ji bei jiu
dialogue.zh_pron: zhi you ni zhi dao wo duo he le ji bei jiu

dialogue.text: I can't look at you anymore
dialogue.local_pron: wo bu neng zai kan ni
dialogue.zh_pron: wo bu neng zai kan ni

dialogue.text: Every extra glance is pain
dialogue.local_pron: duo yi yan dou shi tong
dialogue.zh_pron: duo yi yan dou shi tong

dialogue.text: Actually, secretly
dialogue.local_pron: qi shi zhi dao an di li
dialogue.zh_pron: qi shi zhi dao an di li

dialogue.text: You have looked back
dialogue.local_pron: ni you hui tou
dialogue.zh_pron: ni you hui tou

dialogue.text: I finally know
dialogue.local_pron: wo zhong yu zhi dao
dialogue.zh_pron: wo zhong yu zhi dao

dialogue.text: The loneliness that disperses among us
dialogue.local_pron: qi zhong yang san de ji mo
dialogue.zh_pron: qi zhong yang san de ji mo

dialogue.text: Only the sad fate has it
dialogue.local_pron: zhi you shang xin yuan cai you
dialogue.zh_pron: zhi you shang xin yuan cai you

dialogue.text: You are the only one in red
dialogue.local_pron: ni zui du yi shen hong
dialogue.zh_pron: ni zui du yi shen hong

dialogue.text: Remaining in my eyes
dialogue.local_pron: can liu zai wo yan zhong
dialogue.zh_pron: can liu zai wo yan zhong

dialogue.text: I have no excuse for attachment
dialogue.local_pron: wo mei you zai yi lian de jie kou
dialogue.zh_pron: wo mei you zai yi lian de jie kou

dialogue.text: So this is
dialogue.local_pron: yuan lai zhe jiu shi
dialogue.zh_pron: yuan lai zhe jiu shi

dialogue.text: The loneliness that disperses among us
dialogue.local_pron: qi zhong yang san de ji mo
dialogue.zh_pron: qi zhong yang san de ji mo

dialogue.text: What am I still waiting for you
dialogue.local_pron: wo hai xiang deng ni shen me
dialogue.zh_pron: wo hai xiang deng ni shen me

dialogue.text: You tightly held one of my hands
dialogue.local_pron: ni jin jin la zhu wo yi shou
dialogue.zh_pron: ni jin jin la zhu wo yi shou

dialogue.text: Then separated and let me go
dialogue.local_pron: you fen kai rang wo zou
dialogue.zh_pron: you fen kai rang wo zou

dialogue.text: This time, break up with me completely
dialogue.local_pron: zhe yi ci gen wo che di fen shou
dialogue.zh_pron: zhe yi ci gen wo che di fen shou

dialogue.text: I follow everyone
dialogue.local_pron: wo gen zhe suo you ren
